quantization.serveGate: the exact model artifact and upstream revision must be pinned before any serving claim

primary.name: vllm
primary.reason: official DeepSeek-V4-Flash recipe points at vLLM for the HF artifact path

experimental.name: sglang
experimental.reason: the Exobyt thread describes an SGLang + custom mega-kernel path, not a stock Hydralisk lane

experimental.name: custom_offload_bridge
experimental.reason: single-G4 and consumer-Blackwell paths need expert repack plus hot expert cache/offload

firstCandidates.role: first all-GPU low-context admission/load candidate if capacity admits
cheapest offload/prefetch validation candidate; not an all-GPU serve lane
Hopper all-GPU low-context candidate if capacity admits

blockedHosts.reason: live Hydralisk GPT-OSS 120B host must not be disturbed

promotionGates: exact model revision or local artifact digest pinned
engine version and container image digest pinned
GPU admission captured from gcloud on a fresh non-product host
load-only smoke completes without exposing public ingress
tiny synthetic generation smoke records usage and latency
quantization quality eval passes against a non-private prompt set

recommendation.nextLane: g4-standard-96 all-GPU low-context smoke, or g4-standard-48 offload/prefetch validation if two-card G4 capacity is unavailable
recommendation.why: The 86.7 GB local artifact is too tight for a conservative single-G4 all-GPU run once runtime and KV cache reserve are included, but single G4 is exactly the cheapest place to validate expert repack/offload. Two G4 or two H100 lanes clear the low-context memory preflight if Google capacity admits.
